name: HRQ_QSTNR_SECTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.QSTNR_SECTION_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.SECTION_SEQ_NUM, NEW_PAGE, L.NAME, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.QSTNR_VERSION_NUM, L.DESCRIPTION, L.INTRO_TEXT, B.QUESTION_ORDER, B.RESPONSE_ORDER, B.MANDATORY, B.ALLOW_ADHOC, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.RANDOM_SAMPLE_ALL_FLAG, B.RANDOM_SAMPLE_SIZE FROM HRQ_QSTNR_SECTIONS_B B, HRQ_QSTNR_SECTIONS_TL L WHERE B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = L.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND B.QSTNR_SECTION_ID = L.QSTNR_SECTION_ID AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
